strengths: Shows understanding of intracorporeal suturing technique

drills.name: Complete Task Execution Drill
drills.description: Perform full task5 sequences from needle loading through final knot completion with clear start and stop points.
drills.targets_weakness: Unable to complete a scoreable task attempt

drills.name: Structured Practice Protocol
drills.description: Set up dedicated practice sessions with timer and clear task boundaries, avoiding instructional content during performance attempts.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your technical knowledge into consistent completed task attempts. Establish clear practice protocols that separate learning from performance evaluation.
